title: Change util.EncryptConfig,DecryptConfig, GetFormat and make it public
body:
We want to share these functions with Podman, Podman currently has a slightly different version which is correct, so use correct version in Buildah and vendor it into Podman.

Fixing: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/18196

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Once this merges we can vendor it into Podman and then share the code.

Sharing that would be nice, but let’s make sure we have a consensus on what the right thing to do is.

Most of the conversation is in https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/18196 .
(A “make … public” PR that actually, _primarily_, makes a behavior change, would be hard to track down later, so renaming it.)
@mtrmac PTAL I think I followed all of your instructions.

This is [breaking podman](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6125041562157056/html/bud-podman-fedora-38-root-host-boltdb.log.html):
```
[+1068s] not ok 269 bud with encrypted FROM image
...
# #| FAIL: exit code is 125; expected 1
```
And also, the podman message is still "missing private key", whereas the changed test now expects "invalid tar header"
